scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @tailwind-architect/shared && npm run build --workspace @tailwind-architect/core && npm run build --workspace tailwind-architect && npm run build --workspace tailwind-architect-vscode
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run package --workspace tailwind-architect-vscode
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @tailwind-architect/core && npm run test --workspace tailwind-architect
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @tailwind-architect/core && npm run typecheck --workspace tailwind-architect
